nasb.text: Alas! for that day is great, There is none like it; And it is the time of Jacob’s distress, But he will be saved from it.

esv.text: Alas! That day is so great there is none like it; it is a time of distress for Jacob; yet he shall be saved out of it.

cnv.text: 哀哉！那日大而可畏， 無可比擬； 這是雅各受苦的時期， 但他必被救出來。’”

ccb.text: 唉！无比可怕的日子快来了， 那将是雅各子孙的苦难之日， 但他们必得拯救。”
